text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I took the opportunity to observe your training
methods today. Good work.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Your cooldown in particular is something I'd like
to incorporate into my own repertoire.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'll need to rework my current
training regimen...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me, I have business to tend to.
